name: Appointments: Onboarding

description.en: Start appointment onboarding by opening calendar integration setup for this agent.
description.de: Starte das Termin-Onboarding, indem die Kalender-Integration für diesen Agenten geöffnet wird.
description.fr: Lancez la configuration des rendez-vous en ouvrant l integration calendrier de cet agent.
description.es: Inicia la configuracion de citas abriendo la integracion de calendario de este agente.
description.ro: Porneste configurarea programarilor deschizand integrarea de calendar pentru acest agent.

bot: Use this when the user wants to set up appointment booking for the first time. This opens the calendar integration setup so the agent can book real appointments.

success.fr: Ouverture de la configuration du calendrier pour les rendez-vous...
success.es: Abriendo la configuracion del calendario para las citas...
success.ro: Se deschide configurarea calendarului pentru programari...
